content: Hey, I'm so excited to be talking to you. I just adopted a new golden retriever named Finn from a shelter last weekend.
Congratulations on the new furry family member! How's Finn adjusting to his new home?
He's doing great. I've been taking him on lots of walks and playing with him in the park. I'm a pediatrician, so I have to make sure I have enough time for him.
That's wonderful. It's great that you're prioritizing Finn's needs. What's a typical day like for you at the clinic?
It's always busy, but I love my job. I see patients from 8am to 5pm, Monday through Friday. I try to squeeze in a podcast or two during my commute.
What kind of podcasts do you like to listen to?
I'm a big fan of true crime podcasts. I find them so fascinating. I've also been listening to some great podcasts about beekeeping, which is a hobby of mine.
That's really cool. I've never met anyone who's into beekeeping before. Do you have a favorite type of bee to keep?
I love keeping Italian bees. They're so gentle and easy to work with. I've been thinking of expanding my apiary to 10 hives by the end of the year.
That's ambitious. Do you have a favorite thing about beekeeping?
I love harvesting the honey and seeing the bees thrive. It's such a rewarding feeling. I've also been training for a marathon, which is on November 12th.
That's exciting. Good luck with your training. What inspired you to start running?

I've always been interested in staying active and challenging myself. I started running about 3 years ago and have been hooked ever since. I love the feeling of accomplishment when I finish a long run.
That's great. It's wonderful that you've found a hobby that you're so passionate about. Do you have any upcoming trips or adventures planned?
Yeah, I'm thinking of planning a trip to Yellowstone National Park next summer to go hiking and explore the outdoors.
That sounds like an amazing trip. I'm sure you'll have a great time exploring the park and enjoying the scenery.
